steps.title: Convert side scale to area scale
steps.content:
Square M has side length $5$ times the side length of square N. Areas scale by the square of the side-length factor:
$$5^2=25$$

steps.title: Scale the given area
steps.content:
Square N has area $64$ square feet, so square M has area
$$25(64)=1{,}600$$
The answer is A.
